tips_en: Start with Paper 2 (SpatialWorld), as its sobering finding that even GPT-5 solves only 17.4% of interactive 3D spatial tasks sharply motivates why generative world models like Mirage (Paper 1) are needed to advance 3D-aware AI. Papers 1 and 2 form a natural pair—one evaluates spatial reasoning in MLLMs while the other generates spatially consistent 3D worlds—and reading SpatialWorld first provides essential context for appreciating Mirage's latent memory innovation. Paper 3 (FM-DS-V4) is more orthogonal, focusing on LLM inference efficiency rather than spatial intelligence, making it better suited as a follow-up read if you work on long-context serving.
tips_zh: 建议先读第二篇论文（SpatialWorld），因为它揭示了即使 GPT-5 也只能解决 17.4% 的交互式 3D 空间任务，这一发现有力地说明了为什么需要像 Mirage（论文1）这样的生成式世界模型来推动 3D 感知 AI 的发展。论文1和论文2自然形成一对——一篇评估多模态大模型的空间推理能力，另一篇生成空间一致的 3D 世界——先读 SpatialWorld 能为理解 Mirage 的潜空间记忆创新提供必要背景。论文3（FM-DS-V4）相对独立，聚焦于大模型推理效率而非空间智能，更适合作为后续阅读（如果你从事长上下文服务相关工作）。
